title: Useful Snowball
description: Useful Snowball! Make snowballs do damage, slow mob and even clear all fire nearby!
body:
# THIS MOD/DATAPACK REQUIRE [FokusAPI](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fokusapi) to work correctly, please install it

# ❄️ **Useful Snowball** !
> Simple datapack that make snowball slows mob, more useful! ✔

Support : **1.14 -> 1.21**

## Features
+ Slows mobs surround 3 blocks
+ Clear all fire(Good replacement for water in nether to clear fires)
+ Deal damage to mobs

## Try my other datapacks/mods:
+ [**Brutal Nightmare**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare) - Minecraft, but with insane difficulty. Zombie place/break blocks, throw TNT. Skeleton, Creeper, Ghasts, Spider,Phantom,... get new abilities.New mini bosses...
+ [**Double Jump**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffdoublejump) - Add Double Jump and Leap mechanic to minecraft with sneak button!
+ [**Adrenaline Rush**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/adrenaline-rush) - Add "final shout" & "second chance" mechanic into minecraft! You'll have 0,5 HP instead of dying when fall from height ; Buff your power when you at low HP
+ [**Wall Climbing**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffwallclimb) - Add Wall Climb (Wall Jump) mechanic to minecraft
+ [**Awful Lightning**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffeegs-awful-lightning) - Struck lightning on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts.
## Compatible 
This datapack works well with almost every datapack

## Uninstall 
You can basically remove this datapack in datapack folder
